Metadata.title: Maksym & Diana — 28.06.2026
Metadata.description: Wedding invitation of Maksym and Diana. June 28, 2026, Grand Hotel Terminus, Bergen, Norway.

PersonalInvitation.headline: We are so happy to share this day with you
PersonalInvitation.body_1: {name}, your presence in our lives is something we deeply cherish. That is why it means so much to us to invite you to be near on the day when, before God and our loved ones, we will say “yes” to one another.
PersonalInvitation.body_2: We are sincerely grateful for your love, support, kindness, and warmth along the way. It would bring us real joy to see you among the people with whom we most want to share the brightest moments of our celebration.
PersonalInvitation.closing: With love, we will be so happy to welcome you
PersonalInvitation.seats_note: Your place is already prepared at our celebration table, and it would mean a great deal to have you with us on this special day.
PersonalInvitation.details_note: It is a true honor for us to share this moment with you. Your presence will make our celebration feel even warmer and more meaningful.

OurStory.title: Our Story
OurStory.subtitle: Our journey of love
OurStory.story_p1: Our paths might never have crossed. Maksym grew up in eastern Ukraine, in Kharkiv, while Diana came from the west, from the small town of Smotrych in the Khmelnytskyi region. Hundreds of kilometers and entirely different life paths separated us. But sometimes it is the most unexpected circumstances that lead people to where something special awaits them.
OurStory.story_p2: In 2022, the war forced many Ukrainians to leave their homes. That is how we both ended up in Norway, in the city of Bergen. Here, Ukrainians began to come together, support one another, and spend time as a community. One of those small traditions was game nights. And that is exactly where our first meeting took place.
OurStory.story_p3: Over time, something deeper than a simple acquaintance began to grow between us. We were drawn together by conversations, shared laughter, quiet moments side by side, and a sincerity that was impossible to miss. Diana always brought light, a smile, and songs that could enchant anyone. And Maksym found more and more joy and warmth in those gatherings.
OurStory.story_p4: Along the way, new meaning, faith, and a deeper understanding of what truly matters began to take root in our lives. Step by step, our story unfolded in such a way that one day we realized: this meeting was no accident at all. We are grateful to God for bringing our paths together in exactly this way.
OurStory.story_closing: And now we joyfully begin a new chapter of our story — together
OurStory.photo_caption_first: Bergen · December 2023 · Our first photo together

Gifts.title: Gifts
Gifts.subtitle: Our Wishes
Gifts.intro: To keep things simple, we would be sincerely grateful for your greetings in white envelopes.
Gifts.details: These contributions will help our new family partially cover the restaurant costs.
Gifts.closing: Thank you for your understanding and support of our very first step into married life!

NotFoundPage.left_copy: Even the most beautiful routes sometimes wander off course.
NotFoundPage.card_label: Our big day is still waiting for you
NotFoundPage.title: It seems this page got lost on the way to the celebration
NotFoundPage.description: The link may have been copied incompletely, may be outdated, or may simply lead to the wrong place. But the invitation itself has not disappeared.
NotFoundPage.hint: If this was a personal invitation, message us and we will gladly send you the correct link again.
